name: Wanda Sykes
bio: Wanda Sykes is an American stand-up comedian, actress, and writer known for sharp political and observational material delivered in a dry, candid voice. She won a Primetime Emmy as a writer on The Chris Rock Show and built a stand-up career across several HBO and Netflix specials. She came out publicly as a lesbian in 2008 and frequently draws on family, race, and politics in her act.

timeline.ev: First stand-up performance in Washington, D.C.
Joins the writing staff of The Chris Rock Show
First HBO special, Sick and Tired
Featured entertainer at White House Correspondents Dinner

accolades: Primetime Emmy, Writing, The Chris Rock Show (1999)
Entertainment Weekly 25 funniest people in America (2004)
Multiple Emmy nominations for guest acting

bits.t: Why You Need A Black Friend
